ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-06-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION AND MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) & (D) WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 10/17/05 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 10/7/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT APPLIES. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 8/26/05, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. PLAINTIFF COUNSEL TO ADVISE THIS DEPT. RE: NON-CONVENIENS MOTION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO, CLERKS: V.MU/D. LOK, REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, #3321 (206)
